title: OpenClaw Sub Agents and ACPX (OpenClaw Business Automation Setup)
summary: Jordan Urbs demonstrates deploying OpenClaw, a multi-agent orchestration framework, to automate business tasks including website management, brand learning, and content pipeline automation. The setup uses GitHub repositories as a communication layer between agents, markdown-based knowledge bases for memory, and an agentic harness architecture to coordinate multiple agents including Claude Code sub-agents.
